feedback: Admins need an audit trail for role changes before procurement will approve broader rollout.
Bulk permission changes require too many repetitive steps when onboarding a large department.
The admin console should show who created each report and which evidence was used.
The customer wants exportable access logs for quarterly compliance reviews.
Workspace ownership transfer is confusing when the original product manager leaves the team.
Saved reports are useful for leadership, but admins need stronger controls over who can edit them.
Inviting 40 users worked, but mapping roles to departments took too long.
The buyer said admin analytics would help justify expansion to other business units.
The account owner wants to archive old workspaces without deleting historical feedback.
Permissions are understandable for small teams but become hard to manage after multiple workspaces.
